title: Muskets Overhaul + Shinier Copper Compatibility
description: An Addon for Shinier Copper to support Muskets Overhaul resource pack
body:
This Resource Pack is an expansion for [JJoWY's Shinier Copper](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jjowys-shinier-copper) that adds compatibility with [Muskets Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/muskets-overhaul) by **Cailex** or [Flintl0cks - Musket Mod Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/flintl0cks) by **Scarecrow01**, that are texture packs for the [Musket Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/musket-mod) by **ewewukek**.

JJoWY's Shinier Copper already changes the texture of the mod's blunderbuss, but not when you use one of these texture packs, this resource pack changes the texture of the blunderbuss when using the 3D model.

### Notes
- Don't use both **Scarecrow01**'s and **Cailex**'s texture packs together.
- JJoWY's Muskets Overhaul + Shinier Copper must be on top of one of these packs.
- Don't use JJoWY's Muskets Overhaul + Shinier Copper if you don't use one of these packs.
